metadata.report_title: Cloud Security Suite IAM Auditor Demo Report

findings.title: Root account MFA is disabled
findings.description: The demo root user has no MFA device configured.
findings.remediation: Enable a hardware MFA device for the root account and store recovery codes securely.

findings.title: Customer-managed policy allows wildcard administrator access
findings.description: A customer-managed policy allows Action * on Resource *.
findings.remediation: Replace the policy with least-privilege permissions scoped to required services and resources.

findings.title: IAM user has direct administrator privileges
findings.description: The demo-admin user has direct administrative permissions.
findings.remediation: Move admin access to a reviewed group or assumed role and remove direct user attachment.

findings.title: Console user does not have MFA
findings.description: The console-operator user has a login profile but no MFA devices.
findings.remediation: Assign MFA or remove the login profile if console access is unnecessary.

findings.title: IAM access key should be reviewed for rotation
findings.description: The ci-bot access key is 74 days old.
findings.remediation: Rotate the key and delete the previous key after workloads are updated.

findings.title: IAM access key is unused
findings.description: The legacy-app access key has never been used.
findings.remediation: Deactivate and delete the unused key after confirming it is not needed.

findings.title: IAM entity has inline policies
findings.description: The app-role role has an inline policy named InlineS3Access.
findings.remediation: Move inline permissions into a customer-managed policy for reuse and review.

findings.title: Empty IAM group has attached permissions
findings.description: The future-admins group has policies but no users.
findings.remediation: Remove policies from empty groups or delete groups that are not part of the access model.

findings.title: IAM access key should be reviewed for rotation
findings.description: The reporting access key is 42 days old.
findings.remediation: Track this key and rotate before it reaches the high-risk age threshold.
